allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: V1.3 Release - Time Picker, AI Insight & UX Improvements

1. TimeInput Component Rewrite:
   - Direct numeric input \(HH:MM format\)
   - Custom minimal time picker \(replaces native picker\)
   - Low-saturation gray color scheme

2. Quick Log Enhancement:
   - Add "Link to Backlog" dropdown in Quick Log form
   - Fix dropdown width constraint issue

3. AI Insight Optimization:
   - Shorter output \(3 sections instead of 6\)
   - Consolidated deep insight \(1 paragraph vs 3 sub-items\)
   - Friendlier tone \(companion vs coach\)

4. Error UX Improvement:
   - Lark 91403 error shows actionable Chinese guidance
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: V1.4 Release - Today Plan UX Optimization

1. Smart Sorting: Today's plans auto-sort by planned time \(early→late\), 
   tasks without time at bottom; manual drag reorder has higher priority
2. Auto Category Switch: Selecting a backlog parent auto-switches category
3. Delete Confirmation: Simple confirm dialog before deleting plans
4. Title Time Parsing: Auto-parse time from title \(e.g., "15:00-16:00 Dev"\)
   and fill planned time field
EOF
\)")
